title: Set up 6 DataPackRegistry entries via DataPackRegistryEvent.NewRegistry

reference_files.reason: API overview - 5 framework registries + attribute_meta, DataPackRegistry mechanism rationale
Data pack registration section - registry paths and JSON loading
M1 milestone scope - DataPackRegistry setup requirements

acceptance_criteria: 6 ResourceKey<Registry<T>> constants defined for: modularshoot:guns, modularshoot:plugins, modularshoot:plugin_types, modularshoot:traits, modularshoot:states, modularshoot:attribute_meta
Minimal Codec stubs defined for PluginDefinition, PluginType, Trait, StateDefinition (sufficient for registry registration, full structures expanded in M2/M5)
DataPackRegistryEvent.NewRegistry listener registered on mod event bus
All 6 registries registered via event.dataPackRegistry() with appropriate Codecs and network Codecs (for client sync)
guns registry uses Codec<GunDefinition>, attribute_meta registry uses Codec<AttributeMeta>
